ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the conversation */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the message */,
  "receiver" TEXT /* Receiver of the message */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text input of the conversation */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to generate the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response generated by the chatbot */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to generate the response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the conversation (foreign key to the users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lr_models" (
  "lr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LR model */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conversation the model was trained on */,
  "class_difference" REAL /* Class difference metric of the LR model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the LR model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the LR model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the LR model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the LR model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lr_models_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_models" (
  "rf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF model */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conversation the model was trained on */,
  "class_difference" REAL /* Class difference metric of the RF model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the RF model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the RF model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the RF model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the RF model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_models_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "lr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LR model */,
  "rf_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RF model */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation between the LR and RF models */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of models being compared (e.g., LR vs RF) */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation metric used (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_lr_id FOREIGN KEY ("lr_id") REFERENCES lr_models ("lr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_rf_id FOREIGN KEY ("rf_id") REFERENCES rf_models ("rf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
